heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 152311 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15231136:671., .Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 824, § 1170 Stat. 796
